hooks.command: prompt=$(jq -r '.prompt // empty' 2>/dev/null) && echo "$prompt" | grep -qE '[$]speckit-|[$]grill-me|[$]install([^a-z]|$)|/speckit[.]' && PATH="${HOME:+$HOME/.local/bin:}/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:${PATH:-}" && ! command -v specify >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'speckit-pro: WARNING — SpecKit CLI not found. Install: uv tool install specify-cli --from git+https://github.com/github/spec-kit.git'; true
hooks.statusMessage: Checking SpecKit CLI availability (only when invoking speckit-pro / SpecKit commands)
